title: マイルCSの後に・伝説バク誕！

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: T-T-Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: D-did you see that?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I ran a full... 1,600 meters! And not just that, I
won!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O used to struggle with mile
distances... but she's proven it's no challenge for
her now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
However, it's only natural that I've won today. I
am class representative after all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I always knew I was the can-do type... but this is a
lot even for me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's just... simply sublime!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: My talent is blooming at maximum Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I have just come to a realization!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Do not faint at my words! But it appears that
after three years of continuous effort...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I am now able to run an extra 400 meters!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: If I keep on Bakushin-ing at this rate...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, if you divide 3,000 meters by 400
meters... Carry the one...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Anyways! Give me ten years and I'll win every race
there is!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait, ten years?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Um... what?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She could win any race if she continues to shoot at this pace... nothing is impossible!
choice_data_list:
Class representatives don't sweat the small
stuff!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Gasp! You're right!
choice_data_list: Let's keep up this tempo for the Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh... Ooooh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's go for it! I want to, without a doubt!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: If I'm with you, Trainer, it'll definitely happen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No matter what is ahead, we shall face it
Bakushin-style!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin, BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Nice one! Give me one more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Sakura Bakushin O's journey continues on!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUUUSHIIIN!
